revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ihatano Shrine (Q135038797)
| native_name = 石田神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ihatano Shrine (Q135038797)
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ihatano Shrine'''|石田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917288|ltq=Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11467693|ltq=Q11467693|qid=Q11467693|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province}}
** Series ordinal: 63
** P155: {{ill|Q11470816|ltq=Q11470816|qid=Q11470816|1=Yamashina Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Mizushi Shrine|lt=Mizushi Shrine|ja|水主神社 (城陽市)|qid=Q54153262|1=Mizushi Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q749276|ltq=Q749276|qid=Q749276|1=Yamashiro Province}}
* {{ill|Kuse District, Kyoto|lt=Kuse district|ceb|Kuse-gun|en|Kuse District, Kyoto|es|Distrito de Kuse|fr|District de Kuse|id|Distrik Kuse, Kyōto|it|Distretto di Kuse|ja|久世郡|ko|구세군 (교토부)|pl|Powiat Kuse|uk|Повіт Кусе|zh_yue|久世郡|zh|久世郡|qid=Q1076972|1=Kuse District, Kyoto}}

== described by source (P1343) ==

* {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}}
** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041121143144/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=17005

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 180632
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* イハタノ イシタ

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q135068851|ltq=Q135068851|qid=Q135068851|1=Ishida Shrine (Q135068851)}}
* {{ill|Ishida Shrine (Yamashiro Province)|lt=Ishida Shrine (Yamashiro Province)|qid=Q135068852|1=Ishida Shrine (Yamashiro Province)}}
* {{ill|Q135068853|ltq=Q135068853|qid=Q135068853|1=Ishida Shrine (Kuse district)}}
* {{ill|Q135270104|ltq=Q135270104|qid=Q135270104|1=Ihatano Shrine (Q135270104)}}
